news_title: Top KingWin Ltd Announces 1-For-25 Reverse Share Split
summary: Top KingWin (Nasdaq: WAI)has announced a1-for-25 reverse share splitof its class A ordinary shares, effective September 8, 2025. The reverse split aims to regain compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement of $1.00 per share.Following the split, the company's outstanding shares will reduce from47 million to approximately 1.9 million, with a new par value of $0.0625 per share. The stock will continue trading under the symbol "WAI" with a new CUSIP number G8923U129. VStock Transfer, LLC will serve as the exchange agent, with no action required from shareholders holding shares in book-entry form or brokerage accounts.
